findings.description: The knowledge file table adds two columns not present in the source: 「型」(with values "boolean" and "String") and 「必須」(empty, implying not required). The source table has only two columns: 属性 and 説明. Neither the data types nor an explicit required/optional designation are stated anywhere in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source table columns: 属性 / 説明 only. No type or required columns exist.

findings.description: Section s2 has content "なし" (2 characters), which is below the 50-character threshold. The section also has an empty title string. No corresponding heading or content in the provided source excerpt maps to this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source excerpt contains only two h2 sections (radioButtonsタグ、checkboxesタグ and selectタグ) with no intermediate section between them.
